initial_requirements: I need a WeChat mini-program for identity verification and online transaction services.
user_stories: As a user, I want to authenticate my real name, so that my identity is verified within the mini-program.
As a user, I want to upload ID information and use ID recognition, so that my identification documents are processed digitally.
As a user, I want to query personal information, so that I can view my specific data records.
As a user, I want to conduct online transactions, so that I can perform necessary operations within the platform.
As a user, I want to use facial recognition, so that I can verify my identity securely.
As a user, I want to chat with customer service online, so that I can get assistance when needed.
As a user, I want the page background to be ghost white, so that the interface has a specific visual style.
As a user, I want all components to be colored with cadet blue, so that the interface design is consistent.

conversation.interviewer: What identity verification methods do you need (e.g., ID card OCR, facial recognition, phone number binding, SMS OTP), and what types of online transactions should the mini-program support (e.g., payments, transfers, service purchases)?
conversation.user: For identity verification, I expect it to be implemented through real-name authentication, ID document upload with recognition, and facial recognition. Regarding the specific types of online transactions, I am not sure — could you ask a more specific question about that?

conversation.interviewer: To help narrow down the transaction types, could you tell me: is this mini-program for a specific industry or use case? For example, is it for financial services (like fund transfers, loan repayments), e-commerce (purchasing products), government services (paying fees/fines), or something else? Also, will users be transacting with your organization directly, or peer-to-peer between users?
conversation.user: I am not sure about the specific industry or use case for the transactions, or whether users will be transacting with the organization directly or peer-to-peer. Could you ask a more specific question about another aspect of the mini-program?

conversation.interviewer: Since this mini-program handles sensitive identity data and transactions, what are your security and compliance requirements? For example, do you need to comply with specific regulations (like PCI-DSS for payments, or data protection laws), should user session data expire after a certain time, and do you require audit logs of all verification and transaction activities?
conversation.user: I am not sure about the specific security and compliance requirements. Could you ask a more specific question about another aspect of the mini-program?

final_metrics.evaluator_note: approx_ESR is computed from turn-level action labels and hit results; ReqElicitGym source did not expose a standalone ESR metric.

initial_requirements: I need an instant messaging application for real-time communication between users.
user_stories: As a user, I want to register and log in to my account, so that I can securely access the instant messaging software.
As a user, I want to add friends, so that I can connect with other users.
As a user, I want to create groups, so that I can communicate with multiple people simultaneously.
As a user, I want to send and receive messages in real-time, so that I can have immediate communication.
As a user, I want to send text, images, videos, and other types of messages, so that I can share various forms of content.
As a user, I want to engage in both group chats and private chats, so that I can communicate in different contexts.
As a user, I want to transfer files, so that I can share documents and data with others.
As a user, I want to make voice calls and video calls, so that I can communicate via audio and video.
As a user, I want the background color to be light blue, so that the interface has a specific visual style.
As a user, I want all elements to be dark blue, so that the interface components are visually consistent.

conversation.interviewer: Beyond basic text messaging, what communication features do you expect users to need — such as group chats, file/media sharing, voice/video calls, message reactions, or read receipts?
conversation.user: I expect to add friends and create groups to connect with other users. I also expect to send text, images, videos, and files to share various forms of content. Additionally, I expect to make voice calls and video calls to communicate via audio and video.

conversation.interviewer: What message management and notification features do you expect — such as editing or deleting sent messages, searching message history, push notifications for new messages, and showing online/offline or typing indicators?
conversation.user: I am not sure about those specific message management and notification features. Could you ask a more specific question so I can better address your inquiry?

conversation.interviewer: Should users be able to delete or edit their messages after sending them — for example, to fix a typo or remove something sent by mistake?
conversation.user: I am not sure about that specific feature. Could you ask a more specific question so I can better address your inquiry?

final_metrics.evaluator_note: approx_ESR is computed from turn-level action labels and hit results; ReqElicitGym source did not expose a standalone ESR metric.

initial_requirements: I need a responsive web application that allows users to navigate different pages to view and submit data.
user_stories: As a user, I want to browse different pages, so that I can navigate through the application content.
As a user, I want to submit forms, so that I can input and send data to the system.
As a user, I want to view data, so that I can see the information presented by the application.
As a user, I want the application to have a responsive design adapting to different screen sizes and devices, so that I can use it comfortably on any device.
As a user, I want the global background color to be light coral, so that the application has a specific visual appearance.
As a user, I want all UI pieces to be colored indian red, so that the interface components are visually consistent.

conversation.interviewer: What specific types of data will users be viewing and submitting, and what are the different pages or sections you envision for the application?
conversation.user: I'm not sure about the specific types of data or the exact pages and sections at this time. However, I can share that when it comes to submitting data, I prefer to input and send data by submitting forms. Could you ask a more specific question about the interaction or styling preferences for the application?

conversation.interviewer: After a user submits a form, what should happen next? For example, should they see a confirmation message, be redirected to another page, or stay on the same form? Also, should the form validate input before submission and display error messages for invalid fields?
conversation.user: I'm not sure about the specific post-submission behavior, such as confirmation messages, redirects, or form validation details, at this time. Could you ask a more specific question about the styling preferences or other aspects of the application?

conversation.interviewer: For the visual style of the application, do you prefer a specific color scheme or theme (e.g., light/dark mode, corporate branding colors), and should the layout follow a particular structure such as a sidebar navigation or a top navigation bar?
conversation.user: Yes, I do have specific color preferences for the application. I prefer the global background color to be light coral, and I prefer all UI pieces to be colored indian red. As for the layout structure, such as sidebar navigation versus top navigation bar, I'm not sure at this time. Could you ask a more specific question about other aspects of the application?

final_metrics.evaluator_note: approx_ESR is computed from turn-level action labels and hit results; ReqElicitGym source did not expose a standalone ESR metric.
